subject: Export gene_encodes_protein ENSP edges
description: Create edges/gene_encodes_protein.parquet from nodes/protein.ensembl_gene_id to ENSP protein IDs, validate scratch, then promote to GCS if zero dangling edges.
result: Exported edges/gene_encodes_protein.parquet from protein.ensembl_gene_id to ENSP IDs. Promoted 233,995 ENSG→ENSP edges to GCS. Final GCS validate PASS: 10 node types, 25 edge types, 3,467,844 nodes, 25,559,913 edges, total_dangling_edges=0.
